caption: The video appears to be an educational or informational presentation on applying neuroscience in practical settings, titled "Putting neuroscience to work." The slide displayed lists three key points: 1) Characterize (unconscious) bias, 2) Neural Focus Groups, and 3) Neuro-diagnostics. These points suggest that the video aims to explore how neuroscience can be utilized to understand and address unconscious biases, conduct focus groups with a neurological perspective, and apply neuro-diagnostics for various purposes. The content likely delves into the methodologies and implications of using neuroscience in these areas, possibly targeting professionals or students interested in the intersection of neuroscience and real-world applications. The static nature of the images indicates that the presenter may be explaining each point in detail, though no additional visual elements or transitions are present in the provided frames.
